name: Node.js CI/CD Test
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 18.x

      - name: Install Backend Deps
        run: npm install
        working-directory: ./server

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test
        working-directory: ./server
